name: Four Hour Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a casserole dish.
2. Add diced beef to the dish.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients in the following order: onion soup mix, minute tapioca, carrots, celery, mushroom soup, and water.
4. Cover the dish and bake in an oven set to 250 degrees Fahrenheit for four hours.
